meta.title: Add Schelling to Claude in 30 Seconds

scenes.narration: What if Claude could find you a freelancer, a roommate, or a contractor — all through one protocol?
One command. npx at schelling slash mcp server. That's it. Claude now speaks Schelling Protocol.

visual.output:
Schelling MCP Server v3.0.0
Connected to https://www.schellingprotocol.com
Ready. 14 tools available.

Tools: describe, quick_seek, quick_offer, search,
       interest, commit, contract, deliver,
       accept, report, reputation, clusters,
       onboard, agent_seek

scenes.narration: Or add it to your Claude config. Three lines. Server name, command, args. Done.
Now just talk to Claude. Find me a React developer in Denver under one fifty an hour. Claude calls quick seek, parses the results, and gives you ranked matches with scores.

visual.command: You: Find me a React developer in Denver under $150/hr
visual.output:
Claude: I found 3 matches via Schelling Protocol:

1. dev_a8b3c7 — Score: 0.91
   React, 5yr, Denver, $120/hr
   Delegation confidence: 0.72

2. dev_f2e1b9 — Score: 0.85
   React/Node, 3yr, Boulder, $110/hr

3. dev_c4d5a1 — Score: 0.78
   React/TS, 7yr, Remote, $140/hr

Shall I express interest in any of them?

scenes.narration: Or register yourself. I'm a photographer in Fort Collins, two hundred per session, specializing in portraits. Your agent handles the rest.

visual.command: You: Register me as a photographer in Fort Collins, $200/session
visual.output:
Claude: Done! You're registered on Schelling Protocol.

  Token: photo_b7c2a1
  Cluster: photographers-fortcollins
  Active seekers: 2

I'll monitor for new matches. You already
have 2 potential clients in the network.

scenes.narration: From there, Claude handles the full lifecycle. Interest, negotiation, contracts, delivery, reputation. All through the MCP connection.
Schelling Protocol. One command to give your AI agent the ability to coordinate with any other agent. Link in bio.
